name: Crypto & Polymarket Arbitrage Opportunity Finder
description: Scans and evaluates prediction events to identify mathematical mispricings (e.g. YES/NO contract sum deviation) and cross-asset statistical arbitrage.

tools.name: find_arbitrage_opportunities
tools.description: Trigger an arbitrage scan across active prediction markets to identify riskless profit spreads.

min_spread_pct.description: Minimum mispricing threshold in percentage, e.g. 1.5
